resources.string: ROOM TEMPERATURE (set to match your thermometer)
SWING — sweep the louvers on each axis
Re-sent power, mode and temperature to the AC
No IR blaster detected — running in demo mode (animations only). Check that your phone\'s IR works in Mi Remote.
DIAGNOSTICS — tap CARRIER to try different frequencies if the AC stays silent

This remote sends the exact IR signals used by the official Walton remote (76 kHz carrier), so your Walton AC responds just like it does to the original. Fan speed steps the AC\'s own speed each press. Swing is per-axis on/off — that is all the AC\'s IR supports. IR is one-way, so ROOM temperature is a display value you set to match your thermometer; press SYNC if the AC ever gets out of step.
